div1.entryFree:
Basis, foundation: the shore that o'er his wave-worn b. bowed, Tp. II, 1, 120. build me thy fortunes upon the b. of valour, Tw. III, 2, 36. upon this mountain's b. H5 IV, 2, 30. Troy, yet upon his b., had been down, Troil. I, 3, 75. great tyranny, lay thou thy b. sure, Mcb. IV, 3, 32.
Pedestal: that now on Pompey's b. lies along, Caes. III, 1, 115.
